description: Drag the mouse from one coordinate to another. Returns: 'dragged from ({from_x},{from_y}) to ({to_x},{to_y})'. Note: only coordinates are supported (no CSS selector). To drag an element, first get its position via browser APIs, then use those coordinates. Example: {"from_x": 0, "from_y": 0, "to_x": 100, "to_y": 200}
name: web_drag
